text_original: The best game ever so very explicit in lust and desires .
text_zh: 有史以来最好的游戏，将欲望与渴求表现得淋漓尽致。
reply_original: Wow, reading your message just made our entire team's day! We are thrilled to hear you are enjoying the depth and passion of our characters. Your support is the fuel that inspires us to keep improving every day. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun in Fantasia!
reply_zh: 哇，读到您的留言让我们整个团队都开心极了！听到您喜欢我们角色身上的深度与热情，我们感到非常激动。您的支持是激励我们每天不断进步的动力。如果您有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您在 Fantasia 玩得开心！
